description: Backend data contract for Emergency Contacts page – manage student emergency contacts, medical alerts, and contact verification.

getStats.description: Get summary statistics for the top cards (students with contacts, missing contacts, medical alerts, total verified numbers).

getEmergencyContacts.description: Fetch paginated list of students with their emergency contacts, medical alerts, and address information. Supports filtering by search, class, and status.

queryParams.search: string (optional, searches student name, roll number, contact name)
queryParams.status: enum: All, Complete, Missing, Medical Alert (optional)

students.avatarColor: string (CSS color class, optional, frontend may compute)
students.bloodGroup: enum: A+, A-, B+, B-, O+, O-, AB+, AB-

contacts.name: string
contacts.relation: enum: Father, Mother, Guardian, Doctor, Other

getFilterOptions.description: Available classes and status filters for dropdowns.

exportContacts.description: Export filtered student contacts as CSV (same query params as getEmergencyContacts, pagination ignored).
exportContacts.response: CSV file download with columns: studentId, studentName, class, rollNo, bloodGroup, medicalAlert, address, contactName, relation, phone, email, primary, verified

updateContactVerification.description: Mark a contact as verified (status changes from pending to verified).

addStudentContact.description: Add a new emergency contact for a student.

requestBody.name: string (required)
requestBody.relation: enum: Father, Mother, Guardian, Doctor, Other (required)

fieldNotes.avatarColor: Frontend typically computes a deterministic color based on student name or ID; backend may optionally store a color value but it's not required.
fieldNotes.medicalAlert: Free‑text string describing any medical condition or alert (e.g., 'Asthma — carries inhaler'). Null if none.
fieldNotes.verified: Indicates that the contact number has been confirmed (e.g., via SMS or manual verification).
fieldNotes.primary: One contact per student should be marked as primary (usually the first parent).
fieldNotes.missingContacts: Count of students with contacts array length = 0.
fieldNotes.verifiedNumbers: Total count of contacts where verified = true across all students.
